canonical_definition: Practical Molecular Optimization (PMO), a benchmark of molecular generation tasks used to evaluate optimization performance across many target properties and structures.

relationships.evidence: We evaluate LICO on Practical Molecular Optimization (PMO) (Gao et al., 2022), a standard benchmark for molecular optimization with a focus on sample efficiency. (Section 5.1)
